note: Maddison Project (1820-2022) + Jordà-Schularick-Taylor R6 (1870-2020) on the 18 advanced economies. Roadmap #13 Phase 0 (2026-05): manifest extended from 7 to 35 variables to expose the full JST R6 RORE + credit decomposition + fiscal channels. Same source file, same 18 countries, same 1870-2020 window — zero extra ingestion cost, ~5x more channels for per-variable Gate 1 evidence (cf. evidence_per_variable.md). Used by `position-cycles --horizon long`.

datasets.name: Maddison Project Database 2023
variables_provided: LH_GDP (real GDP per capita, used as Maddison-aligned splice when JST rgdpmad is missing)

datasets.name: Jordà-Schularick-Taylor Macrohistory Database R6
variables_provided: Real activity: LH_GDP (rgdpmad), LH_RGDP_BARRO (rgdpbarro), LH_RCONS (rconsbarro), LH_GDPNOM (gdp), LH_POP (pop), LH_INV (iy), LH_UNRATE (unemp), LH_WAGE (wage)
Interest rates: LH_STIR (stir), LH_BILLRATE (bill_rate), LH_YIELD (ltrate), LH_BONDRATE (bond_rate)
Asset returns: LH_EQUITY (eq_capgain), LH_EQTR (eq_tr), LH_EQDIVP (eq_dp), LH_BONDTR (bond_tr), LH_HPI (hpnom), LH_HOUSINGTR (housing_tr), LH_HOUSECG (housing_capgain)
Credit decomposition: LH_CREDIT (tloans), LH_MORT (tmort), LH_HHCREDIT (thh), LH_BUSCREDIT (tbus), LH_BANKDEBT (bdebt), LH_LEV (lev)
External & fiscal: LH_IMPORTS (imports), LH_EXPORTS (exports), LH_CA (ca), LH_XRUSD (xrusd), LH_DEBTGDP (debtgdp), LH_REV (revenue), LH_EXP (expenditure)

variable_codes.notes: GDP per capita — Maddison-aligned. Long-wave productivity proxy.
Real GDP per capita (Barro splice) — robustness alternative to Maddison.
Real consumption per capita — RBC-style short-cycle driver.
Nominal GDP — combined with CPI gives a price-deflator check.
Population — Kuznets demographic swing + Kondratieff secular trend.
Consumer prices — long-wave inflation proxy (Kondratieff's original).
Long-term bond yield — Kondratieff price-level proxy.
RORE bond rate — JST refinement of long yields.
Equity capital gains — short cycle on asset markets.
Bond total return (RORE) — Kondratieff price proxy refined.
House price index — Kuznets construction swing.
Total bank loans — Borio/Drehmann financial cycle.
Mortgage credit — Kuznets construction financing channel.
Business credit — Schumpeter Juglar investment financing.
Bank leverage ratio — Minsky financial cycle.
USD exchange rate — Mundell-Fleming cycle channel.
Public debt/GDP — Reinhart-Rogoff long-cycle debt thesis.
